response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience across multiple domains, with strong alignment to the required TypeScript, Node.js, Nest.js, and React stack. His demonstrated ability to build scalable systems (e.g., handling millions of HTTP requests), integrate with AI agents, and optimize performance directly matches the role's core responsibilities. While his experience with Nest.js is not explicitly mentioned, his deep backend expertise and polyglot background suggest adaptability.
strengths: 10+ years of full-stack development with direct relevance to the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Proven track record of building scalable, high-performance systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests, AI-agent infrastructure)
Strong architectural skills with experience in multiple languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, D, Java, Kotlin) and cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js experience, though backend skills are strong
Some roles skew toward backend or niche domains (e.g., embedded systems, low-latency Dlang), which may limit frontend exposure
Limited evidence of direct collaboration with product/design teams in recent roles

key_factors.factor: Relevant full-stack experience with primary stack
